case_title: MILTON MADISON VS. NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT MILTON MADISON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLIANANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACOB BLACK, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADISON, MILTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV. 21, 2016 AT 3:30PM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MADISON, MILTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MADISON, MILTON AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-21-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MILTON MADION WHO ARRIVED AFTER THE CALLING OF THE CASE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.'S REPRESENTATIVE JACOB BLACK. THE MATTER HAD BEEN TAKEN OFF CALENDAR DUE TO THE PLAINTIFF NOT APPEARING ON TIME. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT MUST BE RE-SERVED AND THE MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV. 21, 2016 AT 3:30PM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
